task_completion.description: A 3D cylinder is created in the workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cylindrical 3D object is visible in the main viewport, and the model tree shows a 'Cylinder' or 'Pad' feature.

task_completion.description: The cylinder has a 12 mm diameter and 80 mm length.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sketch constraints show a 12 mm diameter (or 6 mm radius) and a pad/extrusion length of 80 mm, or these values are visible in the property panel for the cylinder.

task_completion.description: A rectangular keyway slot is cut into the cylinder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rectangular slot is visibly removed from the cylinder's surface. The model tree should show a 'Pocket', 'Cut', or boolean subtraction operation.

task_completion.description: The keyway is 4 mm wide, 2.5 mm deep, and 30 mm long.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sketch constraints or property panel values show the keyway dimensions: 4 mm (width), 30 mm (length), and 2.5 mm (depth/pocket length).

task_completion.description: The keyway is parallel to the axis, flush from one end, and centered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visually verify in the 3D viewport that the slot starts exactly at one flat end of the cylinder (flush), runs straight along the shaft (parallel to axis), and is centered on the top curve of the cross-section.

task_completion.description: The model is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar shows 'drive_shaft_keyway' or a save dialog/terminal confirms the file is saved to ~/Documents/FreeCAD/drive_shaft_keyway.FCStd.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to construct the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with FreeCAD toolbars, sketcher, model tree, and property panels, rather than just executing a script in a terminal.

integrity.description: The work was performed in a genuine 3D CAD environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD interface is clearly visible with standard 3D modeling views, axes, and grid, not a 2D drawing tool or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent created the features step-by-step rather than loading a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The model tree shows a history of operations (e.g., Sketch, Pad, Sketch, Pocket) being actively edited, rather than a single imported solid or a suddenly completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3D model in FreeCAD. Cylinder dimensions: 12.0 mm diameter (6.0 mm radius), 80.0 mm length. Keyway dimensions: 4.0 mm wide, 2.5 mm deep, 30.0 mm long. The keyway must be a rectangular slot cut into the cylinder, starting flush from one end, centered on top, and parallel to the axis. The final file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/drive_shaft_keyway.FCStd.
